title: canthium oliganthum
intro: Canthium oliganthum, also known as the African mistletoe, is a parasitic flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Canthium oliganthum include reducing fever, treating malaria, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a tincture or extract for medicinal purposes.
